title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic developed CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by Claude API and Claude Code that helps sales representatives draft customer replies in their own voice. The tool was built by Jared Sires, a GTM Product Manager at Anthropic with no prior coding experience, to reduce administrative burden on sales teams.
